notableEvents.label: Harrison Bader GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Harrison Bader grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Bryce Eldridge out at 2nd. Harrison Bader out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Harrison Bader grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Harrison Bader hits a grand slam (5) to center field. Matt Chapman scores. Daniel Susac scores. Bryce Eldridge scores.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Harrison Bader singles on a ground ball to second baseman Chase Meidroth. Matt Chapman to 3rd. Matt Chapman advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Chase Meidroth.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk singles on a ground ball to right fielder Drew Gilbert.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill singles on a ground ball to second baseman Luis Arraez, deflected by pitcher Joel Peguero. Randal Grichuk to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Drew Romo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Randal Grichuk to 3rd. Derek Hill out at 2nd. Drew Romo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drew Romo rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Randal Grichuk to 3rd. Derek Hill out at 2nd. Drew Romo out at 1st.
